message:
feat(tui): focus/selection micro-motion with frame-budget guardrails (br-1xt0m.1.5.3)

Add FocusGlow widget for subtle selection-change animation: 4-tick
ease-out decay with lerp toward accent color. Respects AnimationBudget
(falls back to static when budget exhausted) and reduced-motion
(no-ops when disabled). 7 unit tests cover activation, decay, budget
fallback, and accessibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
